note: Machine-readable mirror of the canvas 'Allowed change scope'. D5 = new files only; D10 additionally opens scripts/, playwright.config.ts and src/__fixtures__/ for diagnosis and evidence repair. Files the plan calls 'modify' (src/server/app.ts, src/App.tsx, src/components/PageShell.tsx, src/index.css, src/api/bazodiacClient.ts) are deliberately ABSENT: each is a hard stop requiring a separate user release.
